title: Create .mcp.json and update CLAUDE.md with MCP setup instructions
implementation_notes: Create .mcp.json at repo root (this is the Claude Code MCP config format).
Update CLAUDE.md: add a new section '## MCP Tools (Claude Code)' before or after the existing Commands section.
- What the MCP server does (gives Claude Code native tool_use access to RelayHQ)
- How to enable: .mcp.json is already at repo root; Claude Code picks it up automatically
- Available tools: list the 8 tool names with one-line descriptions
- Requirement: RelayHQ must be running (port 4310) before tools work
- Example usage: 'Use relayhq_get_context at start of session, then relayhq_get_bootstrap before claiming'
Also update the Dogfooding Workflow section in CLAUDE.md to mention MCP as the preferred interface over CLI when in Claude Code.
acceptance_criteria: .mcp.json exists at repo root with correct structure.
CLAUDE.md has '## MCP Tools (Claude Code)' section with 8 tool names.
CLAUDE.md explains the prerequisite (server must be running).
CLAUDE.md Dogfooding section references MCP as preferred interface.
A developer reading CLAUDE.md can enable and use MCP tools without any external docs.
completion_summary: Added .mcp.json and documented the RelayHQ MCP tools in CLAUDE.md, including setup, prerequisites, and recommended Claude Code usage.
